content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 curiosity-driven active learning agent memory can be reframed as an internal self-orchestrated Agentic RAG system, where the agent’s intrinsic curiosity signal acts as the dynamic query planner that selects which unobserved episodic memory chunks to retrieve and label for incremental learning. This replaces fixed active learning query sampling strategies with adaptive, retrieval-augmented curiosity that prioritizes high-uncertainty memory chunks the agent itself identifies as useful for future planning.
